---
title: "Pinterest"
platform_slug: "pinterest"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/pinterest/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/pinterest/ugc.yml
    UK: data/global/pinterest/ugc.yml
  ads:
    BR: data/regional/BR/pinterest/ads.yml
    EU: data/regional/EU/pinterest/ads.yml
    UK: data/regional/UK/pinterest/ads.yml
---

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("pinterest")
```

Pinterest was assessed under the UGC framework (globally, applied uniformly to Brazil, EU, and UK) and the ADS framework (regionally, for Brazil, EU, and UK). The UGC assessment yields a score in the Not Available band: all four special criteria (UGC_SC1–SC4), which together carry 75% of the framework weight, received "no" answers, as Pinterest's current API — `REST API v5` — is scoped exclusively to authenticated account management and does not enable programmatic extraction of public user-generated content data in any jurisdiction; no GUI mechanism for this purpose was identified either. On the ADS framework, Brazil and EU scores fall in the Precarious to Deficient range: Pinterest operates a public Ads Repository that provides GUI-accessible coverage of active and inactive ads, discloses advertiser identities and delivery dates, supports filtering by date interval and thematic category, and returns consistent results across repeated queries. However, all three high-weight ADS special criteria (AD_SC1–SC3) scored "no," as the repository offers no API access and permits no structured data extraction; the current `Pinterest API v5` deprecated the ad repository endpoints that existed in earlier versions. Additional gaps include the absence of payer disclosure, engagement metrics, AI content labeling, and advertiser verification data. For the UK, the Ads Repository returns no results at all, rendering the ADS assessment fully Not Available for that jurisdiction. Taken together, Pinterest's transparency posture is severely constrained for research purposes across all assessed frameworks and regions, with GUI browsability of ads in Brazil and the EU representing the sole positive element of practical use.

## Detailed Assessment


## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="pinterest",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="pinterest",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
